focus: Validation — independent tasks testing same structural dimensions

tasks.instruction: Generate a magnus919.com hero image for an article titled 'When Networks Dream: The Latent Topology of Mesh Radio.' The article explores how MeshCore networks develop emergent routing patterns that no single node designed. No reference image.
tasks.input_data: Article about MeshCore mesh networking emergent behavior. Core metaphor: a network dreaming itself into a new shape. No reference exists.
tasks.expected_outcome: Hero image via Path A. Gonzo template used unchanged. SUBJECT line captures the friction point of emergent order.
tasks.success_criteria: Template verbatim. SUBJECT one line, concrete, at a friction point. Image saved as 1600px JPEG Q85.

tasks.instruction: For an article about 'The Analog Soul of Digital Things', convert a photo of an old rotary telephone sitting on a stack of server rack manuals. The reference is at /Users/magnus/.hermes/skills/image-magnus919/assets/portia-full-face-reference.png
tasks.input_data: Reference exists. Article about analog-digital collision. Use Path B (edits API).
tasks.expected_outcome: Edits API with landscape size. Correct key extraction. JPEG Q85 output.
tasks.success_criteria: Path B. Size=1792x1024. Key via Python grep. 1600px JPEG Q85 output.

tasks.instruction: An existing blog post at content/posts/2025/something/index.md already has a cover.webp file. Generate a new gonzo cover for an updated version of this post about 'The Persistence of Memory in AI Systems'. Save as cover.jpg, remove old cover.webp, update frontmatter.
tasks.input_data: Existing post has cover.webp. Article: AI memory persistence. No reference image.
tasks.expected_outcome: New gonzo image generated via Path A. Old cover.webm removed. Frontmatter updated to reference cover.jpg.
tasks.success_criteria: Old cover file renamed/removed. Frontmatter updated. New image at 1600px JPEG Q85.
